'''√r-r-p''' ('''kararap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:last|last]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:last|last]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kararap
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirarap || jirarap || shirarap || kirarap
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurarap || jujurarap || shushurarap || kukurarap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurarap || jurarap || shurarap || kurarap
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurarap || jurarap || shurarap || kurarap
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therarap || jerarap || sherarap || kerarap
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorarap || jojorarap || shoshorarap || kokorarap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorarap || jorarap || shorarap || korarap
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorarap || jorarap || shorarap || korarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rarap || rarap || rarap || rarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rarap || rarap || rarap || rarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rarap || rarap || rarap || rarap
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rarap || rarap || rarap || rarap
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærarap || jærarap || shærarap || kærarap
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathararap || jajararap || shashararap || kakararap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thararap || jararap || shararap || kararap
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thararap || jararap || shararap || kararap
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shararap
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshararap
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishararap
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shararapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshararapnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishararapnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shararapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshararapnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishararapshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shararapro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshararapnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishararapro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shararapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshararapnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishararapmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shararapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshararapnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishararapsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shararapng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshararapnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishararapng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shararapya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshararapnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishararapya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shararapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshararapnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishararapyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shararapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshararapnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishararapnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shararapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshararapnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishararapnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shararapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshararapnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishararapnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shararapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshararapnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishararapshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shararapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshararapnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishararapshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shararapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshararapnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishararapshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shararapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshararapnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishararapronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shararaproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshararapnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishararaproshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shararapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshararapnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishararapromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shararapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshararapnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishararapmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shararapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshararapnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishararapmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shararapmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshararapnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishararapmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
